title.description: Header text or element displayed in the panel header.

children.description: Content rendered inside the collapsible body.

subtitle.description: Secondary text rendered below the title in the header.

icon.description: Icon element rendered before the title in the header.

variant.description: Visual style of the panel. Group-level variant is used as fallback.

size.description: Controls header padding, font size, and indicator icon size.

iconPosition.description: Position of the toggle chevron — before or after the title.

expandIcon.description: Custom icon shown when the panel is collapsed.

collapseIcon.description: Custom icon shown when the panel is expanded. Falls back to expandIcon.

defaultOpen.description: Whether the panel starts open (uncontrolled mode).

open.description: Controlled open state. When set, the component is fully controlled.

onToggle.description: Called when the user toggles the panel. Receives the new open state.

disabled.description: Prevents toggling. Header shows not-allowed cursor and hover is suppressed.

headerActions.description: Interactive elements placed at the end of the header. Click events do not propagate.

headerTemplate.description: Fully custom header renderer. When set, title/subtitle/icon/indicator are ignored.

lazy.description: Defers rendering content until the panel is first opened.

destroyOnCollapse.description: Unmounts content from the DOM when the panel is collapsed.

className.description: Additional CSS classes for the root element.

headerClassName.description: Additional CSS classes for the header element.

contentClassName.description: Additional CSS classes for the content wrapper.

style.description: Inline styles for the root element.

id.description: Element ID. Also used as the group key in CollapsiblePanelGroup.

headingLevel.description: Heading level used for the panel title (h1-h6) so the page heading outline reflects the panel.

accordion.description: When true, only one panel can be open at a time.

defaultOpenKeys.description: Array of panel IDs that start open.

variant.description: Default variant for all child panels.

size.description: Default size for all child panels.

iconPosition.description: Default icon position for all child panels.

onChange.description: Called when the set of open panels changes.

className.description: Additional CSS classes for the group container.

style.description: Inline styles for the group container.

headingLevel.description: Default heading level for child panels. Defaults to 3 if neither group nor panel specifies one.

tabs.description: Array of tab objects with id, label, isOpen, and render function.

height.description: Minimum height of the tabs container.

minOpenTabs.description: Minimum number of tabs that must stay open at any time.

variant.description: Visual style variant for the tabs layout.

onTabToggle.description: Called when a tab is toggled.

className.description: Additional CSS classes for the container.
